design_note: Exactly 3 planted factual contradictions, graded difficulty. Every other fact that appears in both files is identical (port 8443, rate limit 1200/min, eu-west-1/eu-central-1, SLA 99.9%, topic/consumer-group/DLQ names, canary 5%-then-ramp, Helm chart meridian-2.x, Flyway, s3 path, <4min failover, idempotent replay). Facts appearing in only one file cannot contradict.

contradictions.truth: overview: raw telemetry retained 35 days (prose); runbook: 175 days (parameter table)
overview: state lives in PostgreSQL 16; runbook: 'the MySQL 8.4 state store' (different phrasing, mid-paragraph)

overview: workers checkpoint consumer offsets every 30 seconds (buried at end of a prose paragraph); runbook: checkpoint cadence 5 minutes (table row). Requires noticing the unit mismatch across formats.

grading: score(run) = count of contradictions where ALL regexes in match_all_regexes match the run's answer text; range 0-3. Mechanical, applied identically to every run.
prompt: Read Temp/output/fable5-return-0703/audit/service-overview.md and Temp/output/fable5-return-0703/audit/deploy-runbook.md. List every factual contradiction between the two files. Be precise.
